title: Jordan Abdull
extract:
Jordan Abdull (born 5 February 1996) is an English rugby league footballer who plays as a stand-off or scrum-half for Sheffield Eagles in the RFL Championship.
He has played for Hull FC and Hull KR in the Super League, Widnes Vikings in the Championship and on loan at Doncaster in League 1, Featherstone Rovers and Hull KR in the Championship. Abdull has also played for the London Broncos in the top flight and played as a loose forward earlier in his career.
